title: Vertex acquires Crinetics Pharmaceuticals for $10 billion as biotech M&A booms
summary: Vertex Pictures has completed a landmark $10 billion acquisition of Crinetics Pharmaceuticals, signaling continued strength in biotech M&A activity. The deal underscores the strategic push by large-cap pharma to acquire innovative small-molecule pipelines and represents one of the largest biotech transactions of the year.

title: AI company Anthropic announces it will begin developing drugs of its own
summary: AI company Anthropic, led by CEO Dario Amodei, has announced plans to enter the drug discovery space and begin developing its own drug programs. The move marks a significant expansion of Anthropic from an AI research lab into the pharmaceuticals industry, raising questions about how AI-first companies will compete with traditional pharma R&D pipelines.

title: Online GLP-1 prescriptions are often fast, easy and low on clinical oversight
summary: A new JAMA study conducted by Yale researchers using secret shoppers found that online prescriptions for GLP-1 weight-loss and diabetes drugs are routinely obtained with minimal clinical oversight. The findings raise safety concerns about the expansion of telehealth platforms distributing powerful injectable medications without adequate patient screening or follow-up.
